summary: Completed testing of new Dashboard and Game Analysis features. All backend APIs (13 tests) and frontend UI components are working correctly. Dashboard is now the home page at /, Game Analysis page at /game-analysis with 500MB upload support, and all navigation buttons work correctly.

issues: Console warning: Chart dimensions issue - 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - minor Recharts library issue

All navigation flows verified. API /api/game-analyze endpoint tested and working.
